title: taraxacum latimarginatum
intro: Taraxacum latimarginatum, also known as the broad-leaved dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its broad, toothed leaves and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum latimarginatum include its ability to support liver and kidney function, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Taraxacum latimarginatum can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
